experiment: Exp72 N=13 (partial run — N=14 in background)
notes: N=13 run synchronously C4017. Original Exp72 (combined N=13+14) died without saving results (session ended while N=14 still running). N=14 launched separately with seed=720014 to exp72_n14_results.json. Methodological note: N=14 uses fresh seed (not sequential from N=13 RNG state) — this is acceptable for size law testing since random product state sampling is IID.
